summary: Command didn't work—nothing appearing in phone app
detailed_context: Nick followed the exact tmux command provided and it failed to produce the expected outcome. The remote-control session isn't visible in the phone app, suggesting the solution was incomplete or incorrect. This is a technical failure: the AI provided a command without verifying prerequisites (e.g., is the phone app actually connecting to the box? Is claude --remote-control box the right syntax for this setup?). Nick is mildly frustrated but staying calm—clear signal to troubleshoot rather than re-explain.
